data.title: Phase II Trial of Ribociclib in Combination With Everolimus in Advanced Dedifferentiated Liposarcoma (DDL) and Leiomyosarcoma (LMS)
data.brief_summary: This is a two center, 2 arm, Phase II study evaluating the combination of Ribociclib and Everolimus in patients with advanced DDL and LMS who have had at least 1 prior systemic therapy. Patients will be enrolled by sarcoma histology into DDL (Arm A) and LMS (Arm B). The purpose of this study is to determine the anti-tumor activity of this doublet therapy in these patient cohorts. Ribociclib will be administered orally at 300 mg/day 3 weeks on/1 week off. Everolimus will be administered 2.5 mg or
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria Step 1:

* Male or female patients 18 years or older.
* Patients must have locally advanced, metastatic or refractory leiomyosarcoma or dedifferentiated liposarcoma.

endpoints: Antitumor activity of Ribociclib in combination with Everolimus in advanced LMS or DDL
